name: Semi-Automatic Espresso Machine
description: 15-bar pump espresso machine with built-in steam wand, single and double shot settings, and PID temperature control.

specifications.value: 2 Baskets, Tamper, Milk Jug, Cleaning Kit

reviews.title: Café quality espresso at home
reviews.reviewText: This machine exceeded my expectations. PID temperature control makes a noticeable difference in espresso quality. The steam wand is powerful enough for proper microfoam. Worth every penny.

reviews.title: Great starter espresso machine
reviews.reviewText: Good espresso results once you dial in the grind size with your own grinder (not included). Steam wand takes practice but works well. The PID control is a feature rarely found at this price.

reviews.title: Solid value for a semi-auto machine
reviews.reviewText: Great extraction, responsive steam wand, and the temperature stability is noticeably better than other machines at this price. The build quality is impressive. Very happy home barista.
